description_long: This is a classic wooden rocking chair featuring a high, slatted backrest composed of five horizontal slats, providing both support and ventilation. The seat is also slatted, with visible gaps between the planks, and is flanked by two sturdy armrests for comfort. The chair is supported by two long, curved runners at the base, which enable a smooth rocking motion. The overall construction appears robust, with thick, rectangular wooden beams forming the frame and legs. The finish is matte, and the color is a uniform light gray, giving it a modern yet timeless appearance. This type of chair is commonly found on porches, in parks, or in urban relaxation areas.
description: A sturdy, light gray wooden rocking chair with a slatted backrest, slatted seat, armrests, and curved runners for rocking motion.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the slatted backrest, armrests, and the full seat with curved runners visible.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back of the slatted backrest and the length of the curved runners.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the backrest slats, armrest structure, and the curvature of the runners.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the seat, armrests, and the front profile of the curved runners.
